Name: Luv Is Rage 3
Tracklist:
It was stated in an instagram live that "Luv Is Rage 3" was on the way, and intended to release in 2021. While 'Finessin Hearts Pt. 2' is confirmed, t's unknown what was on this project, but several snippets were previewed by Uzi on Instagram with the pinned comment saying "Luv Is Rage 3". The last 3 songs are assumed to be related due to them either being previewed at the same time, or being "given" to DP Beats for "DP Vs The World 2" - which very likely could be a lie given DP claims to not have a majority of the songs, updated or old, with vocals (and none released either).
Uzi would also collab with his older producers, from his previous “Luv Is Rage” projects with new recruits.
